word: G1736 - ἐνδημέω - endēméō - en-day-meh'-o - Be at home

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be at home
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be among one's own people, dwell in one's own country, stay at home
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G1722 and G1218; to be in one’s own country, that is, home (figuratively): - be at home (present).
